scripts.build:native-web: npm run build:web && npm run sync:native-web && npm run sync:desktop-artifacts
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run sync:desktop-artifacts
scripts.desktop:build:intel: npx @tauri-apps/cli@latest build --target x86_64-apple-darwin && npm run sync:desktop-artifacts
scripts.android:sync: npm run build:native-web && npm run sync:mobile-icons && npx cap sync android && npm run sync:mobile-icons
scripts.android:build:apk: npm run build:native-web && npm run sync:mobile-icons && npx cap sync android && npm run sync:mobile-icons && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:build:aab: npm run build:native-web && npm run sync:mobile-icons && npx cap sync android && npm run sync:mobile-icons && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
scripts.android:build: npm run build:native-web && npm run sync:mobile-icons && npx cap sync android && npm run sync:mobile-icons && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug bundleRelease
scripts.ios:sync: npm run build:native-web && npm run sync:mobile-icons && npx cap sync ios && npm run sync:mobile-icons
scripts.security:test: npm run security:check-jwt && npm run security:check-surface
